info.title: todo
info.description: dotnet-todo is a .NET command line port of http://todotxt.org/ that tries to remain faithful to the command line and functionality of the original shell script wherever possible.

hookCapture.patchTarget: ProcessExit-fallback (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: todo is a .NET command line port of the Todo.txt shell script from http://todotxt.org/ that tries to remain faithful to the command line and functionality of the original shell script wherever possible. Written by Rob Prouse.

commands.name: add
commands.description: Adds THING I NEED TO DO to your todo.txt file on its own line.

commands.name: addm
commands.description: Adds "FIRST THING I NEED TO DO" to your todo.txt on its own line and adds "SECOND THING I NEED TO DO" to you todo.txt on its own line.

commands.name: addto
commands.description: Adds a line of text to any file located in the todo.txt directory.

commands.name: append
commands.description: Adds TEXT TO APPEND to the end of the task on line ITEM#.

commands.name: archive
commands.description: Moves all done tasks from todo.txt to done.txt and removes blank lines.

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Deletes the task on line ITEM# in todo.txt. If TERM specifiedeletes only TERM from the task.

commands.name: depri
commands.description: Deprioritizes (removes the priority) from the task(s) on line ITEM# in todo.txt.

commands.name: edit
commands.description: Opens the folder containing the todo.txt file in VS Code.

commands.name: do
commands.description: Marks task(s) on line ITEM# as done in todo.txt.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Displays all tasks that contain TERM(s) sorted by priority with line numbers. Each task must match all TERM(s) (logical AND). Hides all tasks that contain TERM(s) preceded by a minus sign (i.e. -TERM).

commands.name: listall
commands.description: Displays all the lines in todo.txt AND done.txt that contain TERM(s) sorted by priority with line numbers. Hides all tasks that contain TERM(s) preceded by a minus sign(i.e. -TERM). If no TERM specified, lists entire todo.txt AND done.txt concatenated and sorted.

commands.name: listcon
commands.description: Lists all the task contexts that start with the @ sign in todo.txt. If TERM specified, considers only tasks that contain TERM(s).

commands.name: listfile
commands.description: Displays all tasks that contain TERM(s) sorted by priority with line numbers. Each task must match all TERM(s) (logical AND). Hides all tasks that contain TERM(s) preceded by a minus sign (i.e. -TERM).

commands.name: listpri
commands.description: Displays all tasks prioritized PRIORITIES. PRIORITIES can be a single one (A) or a range (A-C). If no PRIORITIES specified, lists all prioritized tasks. If TERM specified, lists only prioritized tasks that contain TERM(s). Hides all tasks that contain TERM(s) preceded by a minus sign(i.e. -TERM).

commands.name: listproj
commands.description: Lists all the projects (terms that start with a + sign) in todo.txt. If TERM specified, considers only tasks that contain TERM(s).

commands.name: prepend
commands.description: Adds TEXT TO PREPEND to the beginning of the task on line ITEM#.

commands.name: pri
commands.description: Adds PRIORITY to task on line ITEM#. If the task is already prioritized, replaces current priority with new PRIORITY. PRIORITY must be a letter between A and Z.

commands.name: replace
commands.description: Replaces task on line ITEM# with UPDATED TODO.
